projects.name: everything-claude-code
projects.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
projects.description_zh: Agent 性能优化系统，集成技能、记忆、安全与研究能力的完整 harness

projects.name: superpowers
projects.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
projects.description_zh: Agent 技能框架与软件开发方法论，久经实战验证

projects.name: deer-flow
projects.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway.
projects.description_zh: 字节出品：开源长周期 SuperAgent harness，集成沙箱/记忆/工具/技能/子 Agent

projects.name: project-nomad
projects.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered.
projects.description_zh: 离线生存计算机：集成关键工具、知识库和 AI 的自包含系统

projects.name: MoneyPrinterV2
projects.description: Automate the process of making money online.
projects.description_zh: 自动化线上赚钱流程，AI 驱动内容生成与分发

projects.name: last30days-skill
projects.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary.

projects.name: ruflo

projects.name: awesome-claude-code

category_breakdown.note: Claude Code 生态主导，字节 deer-flow 强势入局
TradingAgents 系列（英文+中文版）+ dexter

key_trends: Agent 生态持续爆发：Claude Code 相关项目占据半壁江山，everything-claude-code 总星 11.4 万
金融 Agent 热度不减：TradingAgents (+8,220) 和中文版 (+2,657) 同时上榜，dexter 也获近 2k 周增
字节 deer-flow 一周 +18,872，SuperAgent harness 方向获市场验证
离线/生存类 AI 系统走红：project-nomad +13,244 反映 AI-in-a-box 需求
开发工具分化加速：cc-switch 做统一入口，chrome-devtools-mcp 做浏览器桥接，各自破千
